[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Vildagliptin 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Vildagliptin</strong> 目前有 <strong>9 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Vildagliptin 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Vildagliptin is indicated as an adjunct to diet and exercise to improve glycaemic control in adults with type 2 diabetes mellitus:  as monotherapy in patients in whom metformin is inappropriate due...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>focal stiff limb syndrome（99.9%）</li>
<li>classic stiff person syndrome（99.9%）</li>
<li>diabetes mellitus (disease)（99.9%）</li>
<li>thiamine-responsive dysfunction syndrome（99.9%）</li>
<li>opsismodysplasia（99.9%）</li>
<li>drug-induced localized lipodystrophy（99.8%）</li>
<li>centrifugal lipodystrophy（99.8%）</li>
<li>pressure-induced localized lipoatrophy（99.8%）</li>
<li>idiopathic localized lipodystrophy（99.8%）</li>
<li>pancreatic agenesis（99.8%）</li>
<li>type 1 diabetes mellitus（99.4%）</li>
<li>autoimmune oophoritis（99.3%）</li>
<li>permanent neonatal diabetes mellitus（88.0%）</li>
<li>diabetes mellitus, insulin-dependent, X-linked, susceptibility to（86.4%）</li>
<li>diabetic ketoacidosis（83.8%）</li>
<li>hemoglobin C-beta-thalassemia syndrome（67.7%）</li>
<li>cholangiocarcinoma, susceptibility to（67.3%）</li>
<li>hypercarotenemia and vitamin A deficiency, autosomal recessive（67.0%）</li>
<li>atrial flutter (disease)（66.0%）</li>
<li>IDDM 1（63.6%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/vildagliptin/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
